title: Pouteria koghiensis
taxonomy: Pouteria koghiensis is classified as a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, which is a family of evergreen trees and shrubs. This family is part of the order Ebenales, which is a group of flowering plants. The family Sapotaceae is further divided into several genera, with Pouteria being one of them. Pouteria koghiensis is native to New Caledonia, a region in the Pacific Ocean. It is a tropical species that belongs to the kingdom Plantae.
